author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Sony State of Play June 2026 Livestream
PlayStation's State of Play returns Tuesday, June 2 at 2pm PT with more than 60 minutes of news, updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world. 

To start the show off we'll get a look at Marvel’s Wolverine. Insomniac Games will be sharing more info from its upcoming third-person action-adventure game showing off Logan’s brutal and relentless combat along with some brand new details. Marvel's Wolverine is coming to PS5 September 15.

Join us after the State of Play recaps for a post-show where we'll talk about the biggest news, updates, and reveals from the State of Play showcase.

#playstation #ps5 #stateofplay #gaming

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Black Voices in Gaming 2026 Summer Game Fest Showcase
Black Voices in Gaming returns with a Summer showcase that includes an exciting global collection of upcoming indie titles, interviews and gameplay, and developer deep dives from Black creators.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
The MIX Summer Game Showcase 2026
The MIX is sparking up the summer heat with 60 indie games that cooked up world premiere trailers, gameplay sessions, and developer interviews.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Tomo: Endless Blue - Official Alpha Gameplay Trailer (ft. Cécile Corbel)
Tomo: Endless Blue, a Monster-Taming ARPG set in a Voxel Open World. Set sail through the Endless Blue, an ocean realm home to mysterious creatures called Tomo. Team up to fight, build homes with friends, or craft wild vehicles to explore procedurally generated islands, villages and tales.

Kickstarter: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/1891746870/tomoendlessblue
Credits:
Music: Cécile Corbel & Simon Caby
Creative Direction: Benjamin Devienne
Game Art Direction: Pierre Armal

Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3301510/Tomo_Endless_Blue/
This trailer features early alpha footage. The game is still in active development and will continue to evolve over time.

#tomoendlessblue #tomogame #survivalgame #gaming #gameplay

https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/
